name: Lord Kou
page_title: Lord Kou 侯寇 – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Lord Kou was of the Kou family, who held a county fief in Changsha, and was related by marriage to the Liu clan of that commandery. When Liu Bei came to Jing province in AD 201 he had no heir, so he adopted Kou Feng, then ten years of age, as his son. (1)

1: Source: Rafe de Crespigny
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Historic details of Lord Kou are sparse. Much of the story behind Liu Bei’s adoption of Liu Feng in the novel is fictional.

Lord Kou 侯寇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lord Kou (侯寇). Father of Liu Feng, who Liu Bei adopted as his heir. His family held a county fief in Changsha.
